description_long: This is a rectangular pink cake with four large, upright number-shaped candles forming '6000' on top, each candle featuring a yellow flame. The cake is decorated with white and pink icing, and it sits on a wooden tray or board. Surrounding the cake are four robotic arms, each holding a camera or light, seemingly positioned to record or illuminate the cake from different angles. There are also small slices of cake placed on white plates near the robotic arms, and a stack of white plates is visible on one side. The overall scene is set on a green surface, giving the impression of a celebratory event being documented or broadcast. The cake and its setup suggest a high-tech, possibly urban celebration or milestone event.
description: A pink rectangular cake with '6000' candles, surrounded by robotic arms with cameras and plates of cake, set on a wooden tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the '6000' candles, full cake, and all four robotic arms with cameras focused on the cake.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the robotic arms' arrangement and a stack of plates, with the cake's length visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the '6000' candles and the robotic arms, with the stack of plates more prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the robotic arms and a single plate with a cake slice, with the cake's side visible.
